name: AI Avatar Plugin
description: A Plugin that creates an AI agent acting as the user's digital twin. It learns the user's values, decision criteria, writing style, and expertise as a profile, then assists with decision-making, reviews, and communication on the user's behalf. Also used as Judge Layer evaluation criteria.
use_cases: Learn user decision criteria and reflect them in Judge Layer evaluations
Draft content matching the user's writing style and tone
Provide instructions and feedback to agents on the user's behalf
Suggest autonomy scope based on past approval patterns
Task review and priority judgment when the user is unavailable

capabilities.profile_learning: Build a profile by learning from past approval/rejection patterns, comment history, and writing style
capabilities.decision_criteria: Structure user-specific decision criteria and provide them to the Judge Layer
capabilities.style_mimicry: Generate text that reproduces the user's writing style, vocabulary, and tone
capabilities.delegation_rules: Act autonomously only within the scope explicitly delegated by the user
capabilities.transparency: All decisions made by the AI Avatar are recorded in audit logs with reasoning, fully traceable

integration.judge_layer: Inject the AI Avatar's profile as custom rules into the Judge Layer
integration.approval_flow: Propose auto-approval for low-risk operations based on the user's decision patterns
integration.experience_memory: Accumulate as user experience knowledge in Experience Memory

note: The AI Avatar cannot approve on behalf of the user (suggestions only). Final approval authority always remains with the user. User profiles are encrypted and stored locally.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
